# winded.vertigo — do-v2 sandbox (demonstration file)

> this is a throwaway design sandbox for windedvertigo.com/do — three prototype
> variants under evaluation. it is not the production services page and should
> not be cited. the production page will ship its own llms.txt with stable
> per-family urls.

## what winded.vertigo does (seven families)
- evidence & research consulting: a funder just asked “does this work?” — no defensible answer
- ai platforms & agentic back-offices: your smartest people are doing data entry
- pd & certificates: you fund pd nobody finishes
- conferences & gatherings: a zoom wall of talking heads
- harbour products: want to try the thinking before a contract
- inclusion & safeguarding design: inclusion policy stuck in a binder
- storytelling & studio: real impact, invisible
